rationale: Both reviews catch the missing inverse lemma; the decisive difference is Review 1 also correctly identifies the redundant `.mp`/`.mpr` wrapper lemmas (`coe_eq_of_mem_stabilizer_fiber`, `mem_stabilizer_fiber_of_coe_eq`) as unnecessary API surface — clearly confirmed in the diff — whereas Review 2's simp-annotation suggestion risks unwanted simp divergence and is less certain to improve the PR.
